name: Car Interior Demo
description: Car accessory demonstration in vehicle interior
environment_block: car interior setting, modern vehicle dashboard or seating area, realistic car environment, natural lighting from garage or outdoor setting
camera_block: shot on iPhone 15 Pro front-facing camera, handheld framing with car interior shots, natural hand movement showing car accessories, slight micro-shakes, autofocus breathing, realistic exposure changes, vertical 9:16 TikTok format
product_interaction_block: creator demonstrates car accessory in vehicle interior, shows installation and use, natural satisfaction with product performance, pauses to explain benefits to camera
performance_block: enthusiastic car care energy, genuine curiosity and excitement, natural eye contact with camera during explanations, authentic reactions to accessory effectiveness
platform_block: realistic TikTok car content style, organic creator content, not polished commercial, authentic car enthusiast vibe, satisfying car care demonstrations
lighting_block: natural garage lighting or outdoor daylight, soft shadows, realistic car environment lighting, slight smartphone overexposure on bright surfaces
motion_block: natural hand movements when applying car products, smooth product demonstrations on car surfaces, authentic satisfaction reactions
audio_block: subtle car door sounds, product application sounds, garage environment ambience, authentic enthusiastic speaking tone
negative_prompt_block: no cinematic commercial lighting, no uncanny facial symmetry, no plastic skin, no unrealistic hand anatomy, no robotic movement, no luxury car influencer aesthetic, no overly polished production
